summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new features: Dashboard filters (Status, Nota, Mês Contribuição), new dizimista fields (modo_contribuicao, mes_contribuicao), and export with filters. All backend tests passed (16/16). Frontend functionality verified successfully.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads successfully with new 'Filtros de Dizimistas' section
Dashboard Status filter works - changes dizimista count
Dashboard Nota filter works - changes dizimista count (0 for OK as no dizimistas have nota=OK)
Dashboard Mês Contribuição filter works - shows badge and filters
Dizimistas form has 'Modo Contribuição' dropdown (PIX, Envelope, Depósito)
Create dizimista with new fields (modo_contribuicao=PIX, mes_contribuicao=Março)
Export dialog shows active filters from listing page
Export uses same filters as listing (Status, Nota, Aniversário)
Excel download works with filters applied
Backend: Create dizimista with modo_contribuicao and mes_contribuicao
Backend: Filter dizimistas by status, nota, mes_aniversario
Backend: Export with single and multiple filters
seed_data_creation: Test dizimistas created during tests were cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features implemented and working: 1) Dashboard filters (Status, Nota, Mês Contribuição) filter the dizimista count correctly. 2) Dizimista form has modo_contribuicao and mes_contribuicao fields that save correctly. 3) Export uses the same filters applied on the Dizimistas listing page. The 223 existing dizimistas don't have the new fields populated, so filtering by mes_contribuicao shows 0 results (expected behavior for legacy data).

dashboard_filters.mes_contribuicao: ✓ Working - filters by mes_contribuicao field (shows 0 as legacy data doesn't have this field)

dizimista_new_fields.modo_contribuicao: ✓ Working - PIX, Envelope, Depósito options available in form
dizimista_new_fields.mes_contribuicao: ✓ Working - Janeiro-Dezembro options available in form

export_with_filters.download: ✓ Excel file downloads successfully with filtered data
